name: sunset-protocol
description: Sunset / Sunrise Transfer Protocol: spin an agent down on one engine (flush + ring-safe handoff + 'Goodnight friend') and up on another (attach + self-update + 'I am fully updated and ready to go, Sir.' + last-3 + ask). Cross-engine consciousness transfer for the OTCHealth/InnerScope fleet. Wraps skills/sunset-protocol.
author: OTCHealth CTO
